evals.expected_output: Agent notes OLD_PROJECT, calls load_project(P0048), checks O0043 for misrouted exchanges, outputs routing confirmation.

evals.prompt: ich hab gerade kurz P0054 geladen um was nachzuschauen, jetzt will ich wieder zurück zu hmem (P0048)
evals.expected_output: Agent identifies P0054 as the misrouting source, activates P0048, inspects O0054 for today's P0048 exchanges, moves if found.

evals.prompt: lade mal kurz projekt EasySAP damit ich was nachschauen kann, danach wechsel ich wieder zurück
evals.expected_output: Agent activates P0043, warns about O-entry rerouting to O0043, reminds user to re-activate P0048 explicitly when done.

evals.prompt: wir haben das falsche Projekt aktiviert
evals.expected_output: Agent recognizes this as an error state, asks which project should be active OR infers from context, then re-activates the correct project and checks for misrouted exchanges in the wrongly-activated project's O-entry.
